headline: Via Separations Raises $36 Million to Deploy Commercial Projects, Expand into Refining and Chemicals Markets
summary: WATERTOWN, Mass., April 01, 2026--Via Separations raises $36 million to advance commercial deployments and expand membrane platform into refining and chemicals.
